name: Takedown / concern

title: "[takedown] "

---

# Takedown / license concern

> This is the **public channel** for takedown requests on
> `ljh-sh/lha`. It is one of two channels — see `TAKEDOWN.md` in
> the repo root. For private concerns, email
> **edwin.jh.lee@gmail.com** instead.

---

## Your role

- [ ] I am the **copyright holder** or an authorised representative
- [ ] I am a **downstream distributor** with a concern about
  redistribution rights
- [ ] Other (explain): _______________

## Concern

**Which § of the LHa license is this concern under?**

- [ ] §1 — copyright clause removed
- [ ] §2.a — distribution content does not include source / docs / ref guide
- [ ] §2.b — added value without source
- [ ] §2.c — binary-only distribution
- [ ] §6 — derived work using the "LHa" name
- [ ] §7 — commercial use concern
- [ ] Other / not sure

## Specifics

**Release asset URL**:
(e.g. `https://github.com/ljh-sh/lha/releases/tag/v0.6.0`)

**File / asset in question**:
(e.g. `lha-aarch64-macos.tar.xz`)

**Description of the concern**:
(be specific — which clause, which file, what's wrong)

## Identity verification (public; do not post PII)

If you are the copyright holder or an authorised representative,
briefly describe your authority (e.g. "I am the heir of Y.
Tagawa, original LHa author, 1988-1989"). The maintainer will
follow up via email or comment for verification before acting
on substantive claims.

If you are a downstream distributor with a redistribution-rights
question, state which package you distribute and how.

## Public-record note

By filing this issue publicly, you understand:

1. The issue body is **publicly visible** on GitHub.
2. Do not post PII (personal address, phone, etc.).
3. Default outcome: the concern is acknowledged and addressed
   within 7 days. False / abusive claims may be referenced in
   future takedown analysis as part of the public record.

---

*Filing under §1-§7 of the ORIGINAL LHA LICENSE; see
[`LICENSE`](../../blob/main/LICENSE) in the repo root.*
